name: Swapi.Union.CharacterUnion
comment:
Code for retrieving fields from a CharacterUnion in a type-safe way.
@docs selection, onHuman, onDroid

values.name: onDroid
values.comment: Select fields to use when the type is Droid.
values.type: SelectionSet selection Droid -> FragmentSelectionSet selection CharacterUnion

values.name: onHuman
values.comment: Select the fields to use when the type is Human.
values.type: SelectionSet selection Human -> FragmentSelectionSet selection CharacterUnion

values.name: selection
values.comment: Specify fields to use for the object.
values.type: (Maybe typeSpecific -> constructor) -> List (FragmentSelectionSet typeSpecific CharacterUnion) -> SelectionSet constructor CharacterUnion

name: Swapi.Query

values.name: droid
values.comment: - id - ID of the droid.
values.type: { id : String } -> SelectionSet selection Droid -> FieldDecoder (Maybe selection) RootQuery

values.name: hero
values.comment: - episode - If omitted, returns the hero of the whole saga. If provided, returns the hero of that particular episode.
values.type: ({ episode : OptionalArgument Episode } -> { episode : OptionalArgument Episode }) -> SelectionSet selection Character -> FieldDecoder selection RootQuery

values.name: heroUnion
values.comment: - episode - If omitted, returns the hero of the whole saga. If provided, returns the hero of that particular episode.
values.type: ({ episode : OptionalArgument Episode } -> { episode : OptionalArgument Episode }) -> SelectionSet selection CharacterUnion -> FieldDecoder (Maybe selection) RootQuery

values.name: human
values.comment: - id - ID of the human.
values.type: { id : String } -> SelectionSet selection Human -> FieldDecoder (Maybe selection) RootQuery

values.name: selection
values.comment:
Select fields to build up a top-level query. The request can be sent with
functions from `Graphqelm.Http`.

name: Swapi.Interface.Character
comment:
Code for retrieving fields from a Character in a type-safe way.
@docs selection, commonSelection, onDroid, onHuman, appearsIn, friends, id, name

values.name: appearsIn
values.comment: Which movies they appear in.

values.name: commonSelection
values.comment: Select only common fields from the interface.

values.name: friends
values.comment: The friends of the character, or an empty list if they have none.
values.type: SelectionSet selection Character -> FieldDecoder (List selection) Character

values.name: id
values.comment: The ID of the character.

values.name: name
values.comment: The name of the character.

values.name: onDroid
values.comment: Select the fields to use when the type is Droid.
values.type: SelectionSet selection Droid -> FragmentSelectionSet selection Character

values.name: onHuman
values.comment: Select the fields to use when the type is Human.
values.type: SelectionSet selection Human -> FragmentSelectionSet selection Character

values.name: selection
values.comment: Select both common and type-specific fields from the interface.
values.type: (Maybe typeSpecific -> a -> constructor) -> List (FragmentSelectionSet typeSpecific Character) -> SelectionSet (a -> constructor) Character

name: Swapi.Object.Human
comment:
Code for retrieving fields from a Human in a type-safe way.
@docs selection, appearsIn, friends, id, name, homePlanet

values.name: appearsIn
values.comment: Which movies they appear in.

values.name: friends
values.comment: The friends of the human, or an empty list if they have none.
values.type: SelectionSet selection Character -> FieldDecoder (List selection) Human

values.name: homePlanet
values.comment: The home planet of the human, or null if unknown.

values.name: id
values.comment: The ID of the human.

values.name: name
values.comment: The name of the human.

values.name: selection
values.comment: Select fields to build up a SelectionSet for this object.

name: Swapi.Object.Droid
comment:
Code for retrieving fields from a Character in a type-safe way.
@docs selection, appearsIn, friends, id, name, primaryFunction

values.name: appearsIn
values.comment: Which movies they appear in.

values.name: friends
values.comment: The friends of the droid, or an empty list if they have none.
values.type: SelectionSet selection Character -> FieldDecoder (List selection) Droid

values.name: id
values.comment: The ID of the droid.

values.name: name
values.comment: The name of the droid.

values.name: primaryFunction
values.comment: The primary function of the droid.

values.name: selection
values.comment: Select fields to build up a SelectionSet for this object.

name: Swapi.Interface
Swapi.Object
Swapi.Union
Swapi.Enum.Episode
comment:
Enum for all episodes that the API has in its system.
@docs Episode, decoder, toString

unions.name: Episode
unions.comment:
One of the films in the Star Wars Trilogy

  - Empire - Released in 1980.
  - Jedi - Released in 1983.
  - Newhope - Released in 1977.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decode an Episode from the GraphQL endpoint.

values.name: toString
values.comment: Convert from the union type representating the Enum to a string that the GraphQL server will recognize.
